response.reasoning: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement. He has deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Docker — core to the stack — and has used Vitest indirectly via TDD and testing frameworks in multiple roles. He has direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, satisfying the AI agent requirement. His work with AWS CDK, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL/MongoDB/MySQL, and Git aligns with cloud, database, and DevOps needs. He has led architecture decisions across startups and enterprises, contributed to developer tooling, and consistently practiced code quality, testing, and CI/CD. His open-source projects and workshops demonstrate communication, teaching, and process improvement skills. His only minor gaps are limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Kotlin/Java in recent roles, but his Java/DLang experience and adaptability compensate. His German is basic, but English is fluent and the role is in Berlin with international teams. Overall, he exceeds technical requirements and embodies the engineering mindset sought.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js/React proficiency
Proven AI-agent infrastructure experience and open-source tooling contributions
Strong DevOps and cloud skills (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) with testing/CI/CD discipline
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js in recent roles, though Node.js experience is strong
Kotlin/Java used historically but not recently highlighted in core product work
Basic German language skills may limit local collaboration in Berlin-based teams
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the core technical requirements with extensive full-stack experience, proven AI-agent work, and strong DevOps/cloud skills. His adaptability across languages and ecosystems demonstrates architectural maturity. While he lacks recent Nest.js or Kotlin exposure, his Java/DLang background and rapid learning ability mitigate this. His communication, testing rigor, and open-source leadership make him a strong cultural fit. The minor language barrier is acceptable for an international engineering team.
